texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Ready to be assumed at any time<FF03>during battle!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Different active Personas will grant<FF03>you different abilities!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Without the power of Persona, you are<FF03>no different than an ordinary human
texto_traducido: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Listas para asumirse en cualquier momento<FF03>de la batalla!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Distintas Personas activas te daran<FF03>distintas habilidades!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Sin el poder de Persona, no eres<FF03>distinto de un humano comun

texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>You will be powerless before the arcane<FF03>might of the demons' spells!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>If by chance you were hit by a spell in<FF03>that state, you would be struck down!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But by taking on a Persona, your defense<FF03>against spells is considerably enhanced!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>For some, it may also confer strength,<FF03>or increase luck for others!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>This, too, is the power of Persona!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Though they are called Personas, each<FF03>is a hidden side of yourself!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>I suggest you examine your status<FF03>carefully after assuming one!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>That way, you can see which of your<FF03>qualities have changed!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>At first, you will be unable to harness<FF03>your Persona's powers to the fullest!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But the more you invoke a Persona,<FF03>the more powers it will grant you!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>As your Persona learns new skills, you<FF03>will have more options in battle!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Even if your Persona learns a powerful<FF03>skill, the SP required remains constant!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>You will grow in combat, but do not<FF03>forget that your Personas grow as well!<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Pardon me for being nosy, but
texto_traducido: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Seras impotente ante el arcano<FF03>poder de los hechizos demoniacos!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Si por casualidad te golpea un hechizo en<FF03>ese estado, serias derribado!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Pero al tomar una Persona, tu defensa<FF03>contra hechizos mejora bastante!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Para algunos, puede dar fuerza,<FF03>o subir la suerte de otros!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Esto, tambien, es el poder de Persona!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Aunque se llaman Personas, cada una<FF03>es un lado oculto de ti!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Sugiero que examines tu estado<FF03>con cuidado tras asumir una!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Asi, podras ver cuales de tus<FF03>cualidades cambiaron!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Al inicio, no podras aprovechar<FF03>los poderes de tu Persona al maximo!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Pero mientras mas invoques una Persona,<FF03>mas poderes te dara!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Al aprender tu Persona nuevas destrezas,<FF03>tendras mas opciones en batalla!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Aunque tu Persona aprenda una destreza<FF03>potente, el SP que pide queda constante!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Creceras en combate, pero no<FF03>olvides que tus Personas crecen tambien!<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Perdon por ser entrometido, pero

texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Personas have eight levels of growth!<FF03>You should try to develop them fully!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>I'm sure that there will be an ample<FF03>reward for doing so
texto_traducido: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Las Personas tienen ocho niveles de crecimiento!<FF03>Deberias desarrollarlas del todo!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Seguro habra una amplia<FF03>recompensa por hacerlo

texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But sometimes, even I will be unable<FF03>to guess at what may happen!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Should that come about, I do hope that<FF03>you'll pardon me!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But make no mistake, I do believe it<FF03>is worth trying

texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>You will be powerless before the arcane<FF03>might of the demons' spells!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>If by chance you were hit by a spell in<FF03>that state, you would be struck down!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But by taking on a Persona, your defense<FF03>against spells is considerably enhanced!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>For some, it may also confer strength,<FF03>or increase luck for others!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>This, too, is the power of Persona!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Though they are called Personas, each<FF03>is a hidden side of yourself!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>I suggest you examine your status<FF03>carefully after assuming one!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>That way, you can see which of your<FF03>qualities have changed!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>At first, you will be unable to harness<FF03>your Persona's powers to the fullest!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But the more you invoke a Persona,<FF03>the more powers it will grant you!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>As your Persona learns new skills, you<FF03>will have more options in battle!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Even if your Persona learns a powerful<FF03>skill, the SP required remains constant!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>You will grow in combat, but do not<FF03>forget that your Personas grow as well!<FF02><FF01><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Pardon me for being nosy, but

texto_original: <FF02><FF01><FF1B>Igor<FF03>If it's new Personas you want, I shall<FF03>fuse and create them for you!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>First, though, I must summon demons to<FF03>fuse together into a Persona!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>And for that, a certain type of card<FF03>is necessary!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>You see, these cards are inscribed with<FF03>demon-summoning spells!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>They are known as spell cards, and all<FF03>demons carry one!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Thus, in order to perform a fusion, I<FF03>will need you to gather spell cards!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Go forth, negotiate with demons,<FF03>and bring these spell cards back here!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Combat is not the only way to deal<FF03>with demons

texto_original: <FF02><FF01><FF1B>Igor<FF03>If it's new Personas you want, I shall<FF03>fuse and create them for you!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>First, though, I must summon demons to<FF03>fuse together into a Persona!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>And for that, a certain type of card<FF03>is necessary!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>You see, these cards are inscribed with<FF03>demon-summoning spells!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>They are known as spell cards, and all<FF03>demons carry one!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Thus, in order to perform a fusion, I<FF03>will need you to gather spell cards!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Go forth, negotiate with demons,<FF03>and bring these spell cards back here!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Combat is not the only way to deal<FF03>with demons

texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>There is rather more to it than that,<FF03>I'm afraid!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>You must take a Persona onto yourself<FF03>in order to use its power!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Each of you is capable of holding up<FF03>to three Personas!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>A newly-fused Persona will be entrusted<FF03>into my care!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>By all means let me know when you<FF03>would like to take on new Personas!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But I can only look after 16 Personas<FF03>at a time, mind you!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>There are as many Personas as there are<FF03>personalities

texto_traducido: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Tambien puedes anadir un objeto a la<FF03>fusion para activar un cambio!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Hay objetos cuyo<FF03>resultado es facil de predecir

texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But sometimes, even I will be unable<FF03>to guess at what may happen!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Should that come about, I do hope that<FF03>you'll pardon me!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>But make no mistake, I do believe it<FF03>is worth trying
texto_traducido: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Pero a veces, ni yo podre<FF03>adivinar lo que pueda pasar!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Si eso ocurre, espero que<FF03>me perdones!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Pero no te enganes, de verdad creo<FF03>que vale la pena intentar

texto_original: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>I suggest gems for obtaining a higher-<FF03>or lower-ranked fusion within an order!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>As for the other items' effects, you<FF03>should experiment for yourself!<FF02><FF01><0C00> <4052> <005C> <505C> <905C> <F85C> <A85D> <185E> <605E> <A05E> <B063> <5869> <9874>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     <FFFF><1600><FFFF>
texto_traducido: <FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>Sugiero gemas para lograr una fusion de<FF03>rango mayor o menor dentro de un orden!<FF02><FF04><FF1B>Igor<FF03>En cuanto a los otros objetos, deberias<FF03>experimentar por ti mismo!<FF02><FF01><0C00> <4052> <005C> <505C> <905C> <F85C> <A85D> <185E> <605E> <A05E> <B063> <5869> <9874>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     <FFFF><1600><FFFF>
